# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` (only `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-6/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-6/run.json` changes) and read the relevant run-liveness/stop/status/recovery/signal-handling implementation paths (`src/cli/run.rs`, `src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/model.rs`). No new correctness, safety, or robustness regressions were introduced by this patch; the diff is limited to run state metadata updates and event logging.

## Amendments

None.
